name: JetBrains Central
description: Open-system for agentic software development. Provides governance, agent execution infrastructure, and shared semantic context for coordinating work between humans and AI agents across the full software development lifecycle (IDEs, CLIs, pipelines, collaboration tools).
capabilities: Semantic context across repositories and projects
notes: Announced March 24, 2026. Early Access Program launching Q2 2026. Works with Claude Agent, Codex, Gemini CLI, and custom agents. Integrates with Slack, Atlassian, Linear. No lock-in design; works with tools teams already use. Air Team for coordinating human-agent workflows coming soon.
